pages.name: Bound Soul
pages.text: Health: 20  Armor: equipped armor$(br)Damage: equipped weapon (1 unarmed)  Speed: 3
$(l)Behavior:$() Combat golem. Follows nearby players, roams when idle, and fights with its equipped weapon.

$(l)Hidden powers:$()$(br)$(li)$(o)Right-click it with a weapon or armor$() to equip it; right-click empty-handed to take the gear back.$(li)$(o)Right-click it with food$() to heal it.$(li)It deals $(o)only its weapon's damage$(); a sharp blade matters more than its own strength.
